name: mes-trading-intel
description: Cowork integration for Jaime's MES / Apex-565990-01 trading system. Performance feedback and coaching — NOT signal generation. 16 skills for daily prep, pre-trade friction, post-trade grading, leak detection, streak tracking, commission audit, accountability posts, and cross-brain recall. Wired to the shared journal CSVs, brain SQLite, Obsidian vault, and Claude memory via 3 MCPs.
